signals.signal_evidence: Meridian Health Systems announced opening of new European headquarters in Frankfurt, Germany, to support expansion into EU markets. The company plans to offer its patient management platform in 8 European languages by Q3 2026.
signals.reasoning: Healthcare company expanding into EU requires MDR-compliant multilingual documentation. Patient-facing materials and regulatory filings are complex formatted PDFs -- core Bluente use case.

signals.signal_evidence: Veritas Legal Group completed acquisition of Sao Paulo-based Advocacia Santos, creating a cross-border legal practice spanning US, UK, and Brazil. Integration expected to complete by June 2026.
signals.reasoning: Legal firm M&A across English/Portuguese markets generates massive volume of precisely formatted legal documents needing translation. Legal PDFs require exact formatting preservation -- perfect Bluente fit.

signals.signal_evidence: NovaTech Manufacturing disclosed in SEC filing that EU MDR compliance for their medical device product line will require documentation in 11 EU languages. Compliance deadline: September 2026.
signals.reasoning: MDR compliance with hard deadline requires precisely formatted multilingual documentation. Medical device IFUs and SDS are complex PDFs with charts, diagrams, and tables -- exactly what Bluente preserves.
